headline: Becton Dickinson (BDX) Q2 2025 Earnings Transcript
summary: Tom Polen: Thank you, Greg, and good morning, everyone.  My comments this morning will focus on our Q2 results and the strategic actions we are taking to not only navigate the near-term environment with agility, but to ensure BD is best positioned to deliver long-term value.

headline: Becton Dickinson (BDX) Q3 2025 Earnings Transcript
summary: At the request of BD, today's call is being recorded and will be available for replay on BD's Investor Relations website, investors.bd.com or by phone at (800) 839-1246 for domestic calls and area code +1 402 220-0464 for international calls.  Thank you for joining us.
